name: slither-wing
flavor_texts: This mysterious Pokémon has some similarities to a creature that an old book introduced as Slither Wing.
This Pokémon somewhat resembles an ancient form of Volcarona that was introduced in a dubious magazine.
text: Slither-wing is the Paradox Pokémon. It is a bug and fighting-type Pokémon. Abilities: protosynthesis. Base stats — HP: 85, Attack: 135, Defense: 79, Sp. Atk: 85, Sp. Def: 105, Speed: 81. Evolution line: slither-wing. Lore: This mysterious Pokémon has some similarities to a creature that an old book introduced as Slither Wing. This Pokémon somewhat resembles an ancient form of Volcarona that was introduced in a dubious magazine.
